findings.description: PascalCase class names appearing in the knowledge file content are absent from hints: `BasicBusinessDateProvider` (used in XML config: `class="nablarch.core.date.BasicBusinessDateProvider"`), `BusinessDateProvider` (mentioned as the interface in the `businessDateProvider` property description), and `Permission` (used in the Java usage example: `Permission permission = PermissionUtil.getPermission()`).
findings.source_evidence: XML config: `<component name="businessDateProvider" class="nablarch.core.date.BasicBusinessDateProvider" />`; property table: `nablarch.core.date.BusinessDateProvider„ā§„É≥„āŅ„Éē„āß„Éľ„āĻ„āíŚģüŤ£Ö„Āó„Āü„āĮ„É©„āĻ„Āģ„ā§„É≥„āĻ„āŅ„É≥„āĻ„āíśĆáŚģö„Āô„āč`; Java example: `Permission permission = PermissionUtil.getPermission();`
